action_set_definitions.name: get_inventory_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current inventory details, synchronization status, and metadata for a specific warehouse.

warehouse_id.description: The unique identifier for the warehouse (e.g., 'WH-ALPHA-01').

action_set_definitions.name: get_pending_transactions
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of local inventory changes that have not yet been synchronized with the central database.

warehouse_id.description: The unique identifier for the warehouse.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_stock
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the local stock level for a specific SKU. Use positive values for returns/additions and negative values for removals.

quantity.description: The amount to add to the current stock_level (must be positive for this task).

action_set_definitions.name: cancel_pending_transaction
action_set_definitions.description: Removes a transaction from the pending queue to prevent it from being synchronized.

transaction_id.description: The ID of the transaction to cancel.

action_set_definitions.name: sync_with_central_db
action_set_definitions.description: Pushes all remaining valid pending transactions to the central database and updates the system status to 'IN_SYNC'.

state_description.inventory_items: A mapping of SKU IDs to their current inventory details including stock_level, reserved_stock, and unit_price.
state_description.sync_status: The current synchronization status with the central retail database (e.g., 'IN_SYNC', 'PENDING_CHANGES').
state_description.last_sync_time: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last successful synchronization.
state_description.pending_transactions: List of local inventory changes that have not yet been pushed to the central server.
state_description.warehouse_metadata: Static information about the facility such as warehouse_id and location.
